_meta.note: FY26 (Apr 2025 - Mar 2026) consolidated figures in INR crore, used only as denominators to express modelled impacts in rupee terms. Verified against the cited source on the asof date. Entries flagged 'derived' compute EBITDA from a disclosed margin. Companies without verified figures are omitted deliberately - the UI then shows percentages only. Verify against the annual report before any client-facing use.
